title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented guidance on building production AI agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent Registry. The session covered integrating agents with existing systems via Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and building custom MCP servers to expose APIs as agent-ready tools.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers building production AI agents with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent Registry, including how to orchestrate tools and agents together. It shows integrating agents with existing systems through Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and building custom MCP servers that expose APIs as agent-ready tools. The takeaway: ADK and the Agent Registry handle agent orchestration, while MCP provides the connective layer for wiring agents into established systems and APIs.
